_comment: Meatspace — reminders to take care of the body running the code. Edit ~/.claude/meatspace/config.json to customize.

reminders.name: stand
reminders.message: Stand up and walk around for a minute.

reminders.name: eyes
reminders.message: Look at something 20 feet away for 20 seconds.

reminders.name: stretch
reminders.message: Stretch your neck, shoulders, and wrists.

reminders.name: outside
reminders.message: Step outside for a few minutes.
